title: Grilled Chiles with Piquant Sauce
description: A tangy and slightly spicy Italian-inspired dish featuring smoked chiles grilled to perfection and served with a creamy piquant sauce.
instructions: Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the smoked chiles for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Transfer the chiles to a cutting board and let cool slightly.
Peel the skin off the chiles and chop into small pieces.
In a blender or food processor, combine piquant sauce, oregano, and garlic. Blend until smooth.
Add the chopped chiles to the blender and blend until well combined.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve the piquant sauce over grilled bread or as a dip for vegetables.
